items.title: Welcome to EG Launcher
items.summary: Browse Modrinth mods, manage instances, and play with Microsoft login.
items.body:
Thanks for using EG Launcher.

- Sign in with Microsoft under Account
- Create a Fabric, Forge, or Vanilla instance
- Install mods from Browse
- Check Partners for Horizons SMP

This news feed updates without a full launcher release. We can post announcements here anytime.

items.title: Partner: Horizons SMP
items.summary: Fabric 1.21.11 with QoL mods and play.horizons-smp.com ready to join.
items.body: Open Partners > Horizons SMP to set up the instance. Default mods (Sodium, Xaero maps, AppleSkin, 3D Skin Layers, Zoomify + dependencies) install automatically.
